common.header: IV INTERNATIONAL FARABI FORUM: THE 1155th ANNIVERSARY OF AL-FARABI

farabi-article.title: Commemorating the 1155th Anniversary of the Great Thinker
paragraphs: The year 2025 marks the 1155th anniversary of the birth of the great scientist, philosopher, mathematician, and musician Al-Farabi. His works have had a profound influence on the development of science, education, and culture, not only in the East but across the entire world.
In honor of this significant date, an international forum is being held to discuss Al-Farabi’s works and his contributions to the development of philosophy, ethics, pedagogy, and modern science.
farabi-article.quote: “Science makes a person noble and worthy of respect.”
